sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: GraniteShares 2x Long META Daily ETF (FBL) stock price, news, quote and history
feed.summary: This article provides detailed financial information for the GraniteShares 2x Long META Daily ETF (FBL), including its stock price, historical data, performance overview, and key financial metrics. It also lists related tickers and other ETFs, offering a comprehensive snapshot of the fund's current market status. The fund aims to replicate 200% of the daily percentage change of its underlying stock, primarily using swaps and options.

feed.title: Canadian Solar shareholders back board, auditor reappointment
feed.summary: Canadian Solar (NASDAQ: CSIQ) shareholders approved all proposals at the 2026 Annual Meeting, including the election of seven directors and the re-appointment of Deloitte Touche Tohmatsu Certified Public Accountants LLP as auditors. This signifies governance continuity, though a high short interest and recent insider selling may prompt investors to monitor future strategic decisions carefully. The company also provided an overview of its extensive operations in solar technology and renewable energy, highlighting its global reach and significant project pipeline.

feed.title: Cleveland-Cliffs schedules Q2 2026 earnings call for July 23 morning
feed.summary: Cleveland-Cliffs Inc. (NYSE: CLF) will release its second-quarter 2026 earnings results before the U.S. market opens on Thursday, July 23, 2026. The company will host a live conference call with analysts and investors at 8:30 am ET on the same day to discuss the results, which will also be accessible via webcast and archived on its website. Cleveland-Cliffs is a leading North America-based steel producer, vertically integrated from iron ore mining to steelmaking.

feed.title: Akamai Technologies To Hold Second Quarter 2026 Investor Conference Call On Thursday, August 6, at 4:30 PM ET
feed.summary: Akamai Technologies, Inc. (NASDAQ: AKAM) announced it will host an investor conference call on Thursday, August 6, 2026, at 4:30 PM ET. The call will cover the company's second-quarter 2026 financial results and potentially provide forward-looking financial guidance. Investors can access the live broadcast via the internet on Akamai’s Investor Relations page or by dial-in, with a replay available for two weeks afterward.

feed.title: Arcturus Therapeutics Announces Strategic Collaboration with Thermo Fisher Scientific to Advance ARCT-032 for Cystic Fibrosis
feed.summary: Arcturus Therapeutics has announced a strategic collaboration with Thermo Fisher Scientific to advance ARCT-032, their investigational mRNA therapy for Cystic Fibrosis. This partnership will leverage Thermo Fisher's Accelerator™ Drug Development solutions for Phase 3 development and potential commercialization, including manufacturing and clinical research services. The agreement aims to accelerate the delivery of this innovative therapy to patients, with Thermo Fisher providing exclusive commercial manufacturing rights upon regulatory approval.

feed.title: A.O. Smith Corp. balances water heating demand and long-term efficiency focus
feed.summary: A.O. Smith Corp. is a leading manufacturer in the water heating and treatment industry, with its business influenced by residential and commercial construction, replacement cycles, and a focus on energy efficiency. The company's performance is driven by its broad product portfolio, geographic footprint, and ability to adapt to evolving regulations and customer demand for reliable and sustainable solutions. Its long-term growth is tied to structural trends like population growth, housing, and the replacement of older equipment, alongside ongoing investment in innovation and efficient manufacturing.

feed.title: Global Payments Stock Rockets 17% With 6-Day Winning Streak
feed.summary: Global Payments (GPN) stock experienced a significant 17% surge over a 6-day winning streak, adding $2.9 billion to its market cap. Despite this rally, the article suggests that the stock carries a "Risky" rating due to its moderate operating performance and valuation. Investors are advised to use predictive signals for future gains rather than reacting to past news.

feed.title: Northrop Grumman highlights its defense role as a major US contractor
feed.summary: The article highlights Northrop Grumman's role as a major U.S. defense and aerospace contractor, emphasizing its steady involvement in long-term government programs and advanced military technologies. It details the company's diversified segment structure, covering aircraft, mission systems, space technologies, and defense services, which provides stable revenue streams driven by policy decisions and security concerns rather than short-term consumer cycles. The company’s long-term contract visibility, advanced products like military aircraft and satellite systems, and market context within the defense industry are also discussed.

feed.title: Avery Dennison balances packaging demand and label innovation as global trends shift
feed.summary: Avery Dennison is strategically navigating global trends in packaging and logistics by focusing on its label and materials portfolio, with an emphasis on sustainability, automation, and efficiency to drive long-term growth. The company provides a wide range of labeling solutions, including pressure-sensitive materials and intelligent RFID tags, catering to diverse sectors like consumer goods, automotive, and retail. Its efforts to optimize operational margins, adapt to evolving end-market demands, and integrate sustainable practices are key to its continued success in a dynamic industry.

feed.title: Canadian Natural Resources (TSX:CNQ) Hits Record Q1 Output
feed.summary: Canadian Natural Resources (TSX:CNQ) achieved a record first-quarter production of approximately 1.6 million barrels of oil equivalent per day. The company reported strong performance across its oil sands, conventional assets, and natural gas operations. CNQ is a significant constituent of the S&P/TSX Composite Index within Canada's energy sector.

feed.title: Ameren Corp. focuses on regulated utilities and long-term grid investment
feed.summary: Ameren Corp. is a U.S. Midwest-based energy company focused on regulated electric and natural gas utilities. Its strategy centers on grid modernization, integrating renewable energy, and ensuring stable, regulated returns through long-term capital investments. The company's business model thrives on predictable cash flows from regulated distribution and transmission networks, with ongoing investments in infrastructure upgrades and clean energy initiatives.

feed.title: International Paper (IP) Stock Looks Undervalued As It Plans Four Facility Closures
feed.summary: International Paper (IP) stock has gained 40% over three years, yet current valuations suggest it may still be undervalued despite a -20.3% return in the last year. The company plans to close four North American facilities, which could improve margins but carries execution risks. While its P/S ratio is above the industry average, it is below its peer group and estimated fair value, signaling potential undervaluation as the company navigates operational changes.

feed.title: Phillips 66 (PSX) Teams With Kanin Energy On 7 Megawatt Power Project
feed.summary: Phillips 66 (PSX) has partnered with Kanin Energy to develop a 7-megawatt waste heat to power facility at its Mewbourn complex. This project aims to generate electricity from waste heat, reducing greenhouse gas emissions and power costs for Phillips 66 while limiting upfront capital through a turnkey solution from Kanin Energy. This initiative highlights Phillips 66's strategy for incorporating cleaner power options and improving operational efficiency in its midstream and refining operations.

feed.title: Motorola Solutions (MSI) Extends Denmark Emergency Network For 8 More Years
feed.summary: Motorola Solutions (NYSE:MSI) has extended its contract for Denmark's Sikkerhedsnettet emergency communications network by more than eight years. This agreement includes over 45,000 emergency services users and introduces new software for roaming between TETRA and broadband, enhancing the network's capabilities. The extension highlights Motorola Solutions' crucial role in mission-critical communications and the durability of its public safety customer relationships, providing long-term revenue visibility and potential for further software and service adoption.

feed.title: Federal Realty highlights its retail-focused strategy as a US REIT. Portfolio quality and steady income appeal to long-term investors.
feed.summary: Federal Realty, a US-based real estate investment trust, focuses on high-quality retail and mixed-use properties, emphasizing stable rental income, redevelopment, and long-term tenant relationships. The company's strategy involves owning properties in affluent areas with strong demographics and distributing a significant portion of its earnings as dividends. Federal Realty aims to adapt to evolving retail trends by incorporating mixed-use elements and focusing on necessity-based and experience-oriented tenants, while maintaining financial discipline and transparency for investors.

feed.title: Jacobs secures owner’s engineer role for wind farm project in South Australia
feed.summary: Jacobs has been selected by Tilt Renewables to serve as Owner's Engineer for the 288-megawatt Palmer Wind Farm near Adelaide, South Australia. This project, which will feature 407.2MW wind turbine generators, aims to strengthen Australia's renewable energy portfolio and support its decarbonization goals. Jacobs will provide critical delivery phase services during the construction, which is expected to run from 2026 to 2028.

feed.title: EOG Resources focuses on shale efficiency as US energy demand stays resilient
feed.summary: EOG Resources, a major independent US shale producer, prioritizes capital discipline and efficient oil and gas development to navigate volatile energy markets. The company focuses on return on invested capital and free cash flow generation, adapting its activity levels to prevailing prices. Its operational model relies on a deep inventory of drilling locations with competitive break-even costs, emphasizing improved drilling times, optimized completion designs, and robust infrastructure access to maximize recovery and manage costs.

feed.title: Newmont Corporation balances gold production scale and long term investment story
feed.summary: Newmont Corporation, a leading global gold producer, offers investors exposure to precious metals through a diversified portfolio of mines across various regions. The company's financial performance is strongly tied to gold prices, but also influenced by cost management and capital allocation decisions. Newmont is considered a key holding for investors seeking a blend of commodity sensitivity with the governance of a publicly traded corporation.

feed.title: S&P Global Completes Spin-Off of Mobility Division
feed.summary: S&P Global completed the spin-off of its automotive-focused Mobility division into Mobility Global Inc. on July 1, 2026. Mobility Global, trading under MBGL on the NYSE, distributed one share to S&P Global shareholders for every SPGI share held. This strategic separation allows S&P Global to focus on its core data and analytics, while Mobility Global establishes its independent presence, supported by various agreements to ensure a smooth transition.

feed.title: Amazon Is Quietly Building its Own AI Chips As Devices Chief Panos Panay Reveals a Bigger Bet Beyond Qual
feed.summary: Amazon is increasing its in-house production of custom AI chips for its consumer devices like the Echo Show and Fire TV, with Devices Chief Panos Panay confirming this strategy. This move supports Amazon's expanded AI ecosystem, including Alexa+ and Alexa for Shopping, aiming to enhance user experience with more natural, context-aware AI interactions. Despite this focus, Amazon will continue to utilize chips from other companies such as Qualcomm.

feed.title: AutoZone Inc. focuses on aftermarket growth as US drivers keep vehicles longer
feed.summary: AutoZone Inc. continues to capitalize on the aftermarket growth driven by an aging US vehicle fleet and consistent demand for repair parts. The company's strategy success relies on its robust store network, efficient distribution, and a dual focus on both retail (DIY) and commercial customers. This approach stabilizes revenue, especially as vehicles are kept longer, increasing the need for maintenance and repairs.

feed.title: WD Rutherford LLC Has $498,000 Stake in Fortinet, Inc. $FTNT
feed.summary: WD Rutherford LLC significantly reduced its stake in Fortinet, Inc. (NASDAQ:FTNT) by 64.5% in the first quarter, now holding 6,092 shares worth $498,000. This follows substantial insider selling, including shares from CEO Ken Xie and VP Michael Xie, totaling $43.4 million in the last three months. Despite institutional investment, analysts maintain a mixed "Hold" rating with an average price target of $107.58, though some have raised their targets citing cybersecurity growth.

feed.title: Crown Holdings Inc. (CCK) Stock Price | Live Quotes & Charts | NYSE
feed.summary: This page provides live quotes and charts for Crown Holdings Inc. (CCK) stock on the NYSE, showing its current price and daily performance. It also indicates that there is no analyst rating information available and no earnings data at the moment. The content is presented as typically found on a trading platform, offering stock data rather than a traditional article.

feed.title: Vision Capital Management Inc. Increases Stake in Bank of America Corporation $BAC
feed.summary: Vision Capital Management Inc. has increased its stake in Bank of America Corporation (NYSE:BAC) by 18.8% in the first quarter of 2026, bringing its total holding to 124,630 shares worth approximately $6.1 million. This increase comes as Bank of America reported strong quarterly earnings, surpassing analyst estimates, and has received positive sentiment from institutional investors and analysts alike. Despite a modest regulatory fine against Merrill Lynch, the stock shows robust institutional backing and favorable future earnings expectations.

feed.title: 7,553 Shares in American Express Company $AXP Acquired by WD Rutherford LLC
feed.summary: WD Rutherford LLC recently acquired 7,553 shares of American Express Company (NYSE:AXP), amounting to approximately $2.29 million, in the first quarter. American Express exceeded analyst expectations with Q1 earnings of $4.28 per share, a revenue increase of 11.4%, and provided optimistic FY 2026 EPS guidance. The company also declared a quarterly dividend of $0.95 per share and currently holds a "Moderate Buy" rating from analysts with a consensus price target of $366.95.

feed.title: TKG Advisors LLC Purchases New Shares in Ciena Corporation $CIEN
feed.summary: TKG Advisors LLC has acquired a new position in Ciena Corporation (NYSE:CIEN), purchasing 8,356 shares valued at $3,244,000, making it their 23rd largest holding. Other institutional investors also increased their stakes in Ciena, while company insiders, including CEO Gary B. Smith and SVP Brodie Gage, sold shares. Ciena recently reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst expectations, and has received new analyst ratings with an average price target of $530.56.

feed.title: Humana Foundation awards $12M to combat loneliness among seniors
feed.summary: The Humana Foundation has announced a $12 million initiative to combat loneliness, depression, and social isolation among older adults. A significant portion of this funding, $1.45 million, is earmarked for programs specifically in Louisville. This effort highlights the foundation's commitment to supporting the well-being of seniors.

feed.title: Synchrony Financial highlights its consumer finance platform as investors watch credit trends
feed.summary: Synchrony Financial continues to expand its consumer credit and payments platform, focusing on private label credit cards, co-branded cards, and installment financing programs. The company emphasizes disciplined risk management and leverages digital platforms and data analytics to optimize customer engagement and credit quality, while investors closely monitor credit trends, digital growth, and the broader U.S. retail environment. Its performance is often evaluated against macroeconomic indicators and consumer spending trends.

feed.title: Sysco Corp. focuses on foodservice scale as US demand stays resilient
feed.summary: Sysco Corp., a major foodservice distributor in North America, leverages its scale and logistics network to serve various customers from restaurants to institutions across the US. Its performance is closely linked to US consumer spending, dining trends, and controlling costs from inflation and labor. The company's business model relies on high-volume distribution, operational efficiency, and technology investments while offering a broad product assortment and value-added services to maintain customer relationships and profitability.

feed.title: EQT Corp. highlights its role in U.S. natural gas. Focus on scale, infrastructure and long-term dema
feed.summary: EQT Corp. is presented as a major independent natural gas producer in the U.S., emphasizing its significant scale, robust infrastructure, and strategic contract base within the Appalachian basin. The company's business model revolves around acquiring and developing natural gas reserves, operating wells, and selling processed gas to utilities and industrial customers. The article highlights how EQT's position in the U.S. gas value chain, combined with its operational footprint and financial strategies, makes it a key benchmark for U.S. upstream gas exposure and an important investment for exposure to the U.S. natural gas market.

feed.title: Everest makes key leadership changes within Global Wholesale & Specialty
feed.summary: Everest Group, Ltd. has made key leadership changes within its Global Wholesale & Specialty unit, appointing Stephen Buonpane as Global Head of Construction and promoting Danielle Stewart to President of Everest Evolution™. These changes aim to strengthen Everest's global construction business and further develop its wholesale platform in the U.S. market.

feed.title: Raymond James Adjusts PT on C.H. Robinson Worldwide to $203 From $210, Maintains Outperform Rating
feed.summary: Raymond James has adjusted its price target for C.H. Robinson Worldwide (CHRW) to $203 from $210, while reiterating an Outperform rating on the stock. This update comes shortly after Evercore ISI also revised its price target for CHRW to $224 from $222, maintaining an Outperform rating. The company was recently added to several Russell Growth Benchmarks, indicating a positive market sentiment.

feed.title: NiSource Inc. highlights regulated utility model as investors weigh long-term growth
feed.summary: NiSource Inc. operates as a regulated utility providing natural gas and electric services across several U.S. states, emphasizing stable cash flows and continuous infrastructure investment. The company's business model benefits from a regulated framework that offers predictable revenue streams, making it a consideration for investors seeking exposure to essential services. NiSource's strategy focuses on infrastructure modernization, safety, and reliability, with growth driven by capital investment programs that increase its rate base over time.

feed.title: BMO Capital Adjusts PT on TransDigm to $1,525 From $1,450, Maintains Outperform Rating
feed.summary: BMO Capital has increased its price target for TransDigm (TDG) from $1,450 to $1,525, reiterating an Outperform rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects BMO Capital's continued positive outlook on the aerospace and defense company. The article also lists recent analyst price target changes and insider transactions for TransDigm.

feed.title: REG - L&G – Asset Mgmt. Ld Prologis, Inc. - Form 8.3 - Prologis, Inc.
feed.summary: L&G - Asset Management Limited has filed a Form 8.3 disclosure regarding its interests and dealings in Prologis, Inc. securities. As of July 1, 2026, L&G - Asset Management Limited holds 10,847,602 relevant securities, representing 1.16% of Prologis, Inc., and also made sales and purchases of USD 0.01 class relevant securities. The disclosure also indicates that L&G - Asset Management Limited is making disclosures in respect of SEGRO plc.

feed.title: Illinois Tool Works holds steady as investors watch the industrial cycle.
feed.summary: Illinois Tool Works (ITW) is a large-cap industrial company on the NYSE, with investors focused on demand trends across its diversified portfolio. The company's stock movement is not tied to a new catalyst, placing emphasis on broader industrial cycle trends and upcoming earnings. ITW's business model relies on specialized industrial products across various niches, making it less dependent on any single category.

feed.title: Jack Henry & Associates Stock Surges 15%, With A 7-Day Winning Spree
feed.summary: Jack Henry & Associates (JKHY) has experienced a 7-day winning streak, with its stock surging 15% and its market cap increasing by about $1.4 billion. Despite this strong performance, the stock is considered to have a moderate valuation, making it an attractive investment according to Trefis. The article also highlights the importance of predictive signals for identifying opportunities before they become public knowledge, as exemplified by the Trefis High Quality Portfolio's outperformance.

feed.title: Vulcan Materials outlines long-term growth path as construction demand evolves
feed.summary: Vulcan Materials, a leading U.S. aggregates producer, focuses on long-term growth driven by infrastructure spending, housing, and industrial construction. The company's strategy emphasizes scale, efficient logistics, and disciplined capital allocation to maintain margins and navigate market cycles. Its success is closely linked to government funding for infrastructure and broad construction activities, while also managing environmental regulations and capital-intensive operations.

feed.title: Compass Pathways Announces New Employee Inducement Grants Under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4)
feed.summary: Compass Pathways plc announced equity awards granted to eight new non-executive employees under its 2026 Inducement Plan. These grants, consisting of options and restricted share units, were made on July 1, 2026, as a material inducement for employment and are in compliance with NASDAQ Listing Rule 5635(c)(4). The company focuses on accelerating patient access to evidence-based innovation in mental health, particularly through its investigational COMP360 synthetic psilocybin treatment.

feed.title: EOG Maintained by Jefferies -- Price Target Raised to $175
feed.summary: Jefferies has maintained a 'Buy' rating for EOG Resources (EOG) and increased its price target to $175.00, indicating a positive outlook for the stock. Despite some mixed analyst signals, GuruFocus suggests EOG is currently undervalued by 7.7% and holds a moderate GF Score™ of 66/100, though it shows weaknesses in growth and momentum. Insider selling activity has been noted recently, suggesting a cautious sentiment among some.

feed.title: Vertrix Wealth Management LLC Purchases Shares of 17,806 Waste Management, Inc. $WM
feed.summary: Vertrix Wealth Management LLC acquired 17,806 shares of Waste Management, Inc. (WM), valued at approximately $4.09 million, making it their 26th largest holding. Waste Management reported stronger-than-expected earnings of $1.81 EPS against estimates of $1.75, though revenue slightly missed expectations at $6.23 billion. The company also announced a quarterly dividend of $0.945 per share, and analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with a target price of $255.30.

feed.title: TKG Advisors LLC Has $2.68 Million Stock Position in RTX Corporation $RTX
feed.summary: TKG Advisors LLC significantly increased its stake in RTX Corporation by 101.2% in the first quarter, now holding 13,911 shares valued at approximately $2.68 million. This increase follows positive news for RTX, including a substantial U.S. Navy missile contract for Raytheon and strong performance from Pratt & Whitney's F119 engine. The company also reaffirmed its quarterly dividend of $0.73 per share and exceeded earnings and revenue estimates in its most recent quarterly report.

feed.title: Form FWP CITIGROUP INC Filed by: CITIGROUP INC
feed.summary: Citigroup Global Markets Holdings Inc., guaranteed by Citigroup Inc., has filed an FWP form for 1 Year Barrier Securities linked to the S&P 500® Index (SPX). The preliminary terms outline a maximum return at maturity of at least 12.25% and highlight that investors may lose a significant portion or all of their investment if the final underlying value falls below the final barrier value, set at 80.00% of the initial underlying value. The document also details selected risk considerations, including credit risk and the absence of interest payments or dividends.

feed.title: Form FWP Citigroup Global Markets Filed by: Citigroup Global Markets Holdings Inc.
feed.summary: Citigroup Global Markets Holdings Inc., guaranteed by Citigroup Inc., has filed a Form FWP for 1 Year Barrier Securities linked to the S&P 500® Index. These securities offer a hypothetical payment at maturity with a maximum return of at least 12.25% if the underlying index performs positively, but investors risk significant loss if the index falls below a specified barrier value. The offering is subject to various risks, including credit risk of the issuers, and is not listed on any exchange.

feed.title: Q1 Rundown: Waste Management (NYSE:WM) Vs Other Waste Management Stocks
feed.summary: This article reviews the Q1 2026 performance of Waste Management (NYSE:WM) and other key players in the waste management sector. It highlights Waste Management's revenue miss, Onterris' strong quarter despite a revenue decline, and Perma-Fix's weakest performance against analyst estimates. The piece also briefly touches on Quest Resource and Waste Connections' results, and discusses shifting market concerns from AI disruption to geopolitical risks.

feed.title: Q1 Earnings Highs And Lows: Campbell's (NASDAQ:CPB) Vs The Rest Of The Shelf-Stable Food Stocks
feed.summary: This article analyzes the Q1 2026 earnings for shelf-stable food stocks, comparing Campbell's (NASDAQ:CPB) performance against peers like Hershey (NYSE:HSY), BellRing Brands (NYSE:BRBR), Utz (NYSE:UTZ), and McCormick (NYSE:MKC). It highlights that while the sector had mixed results, Campbell's revenues were slightly below expectations, Hershey exceeded them, and BellRing Brands had a disappointing quarter. The article also touches on broader market shifts from AI concerns to geopolitical risks.

feed.title: USS Investment Management Ltd Reduces Stake in The Home Depot, Inc. $HD
feed.summary: USS Investment Management Ltd reduced its stake in The Home Depot, Inc. by 10.5% in the first quarter of 2026, selling 62,110 shares but still holding 531,317 shares valued at $174.7 million. Despite this reduction, institutional ownership of Home Depot remains high at 70.86%, with several other hedge funds increasing their positions. The company recently reported strong quarterly earnings, beating estimates with $3.43 EPS on $41.77 billion in revenue, and maintained its quarterly dividend of $2.33 per share, yielding 2.7%.

feed.title: Halliburton Company $HAL Shares Sold by Pzena Investment Management LLC
feed.summary: Pzena Investment Management LLC significantly reduced its stake in Halliburton (NYSE:HAL) by 23.7% in the first quarter, selling 1.27 million shares. Despite this, analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average price target of $43.27, and the company recently exceeded EPS estimates while paying a quarterly dividend. Insider selling also occurred, with key executives divesting shares totaling over $10 million in the past three months.

feed.title: USS Investment Management Ltd Buys 5,660 Shares of Simon Property Group, Inc. $SPG
feed.summary: USS Investment Management Ltd increased its stake in Simon Property Group (NYSE:SPG) by 9.2% in the first quarter, adding 5,660 shares to hold a total of 67,384 shares valued at $12.6 million. Institutional investors collectively own 93.01% of the company's stock, with several other funds also modestly increasing their positions. Analysts maintain a "Hold" rating for SPG, with an average target price of $211.47, while recent insider purchases and a price target raise from Barclays suggest positive sentiment ahead of upcoming earnings.

feed.title: Pzena Investment Management LLC Acquires 697,995 Shares of Fifth Third Bancorp $FITB
feed.summary: Pzena Investment Management LLC significantly increased its stake in Fifth Third Bancorp by 74.4% in the first quarter, purchasing 697,995 additional shares and bringing its total to 1,635,817 shares valued at approximately $76 million. Other institutional investors also adjusted their holdings in the bank. Fifth Third Bancorp reported Q1 earnings of $0.83 per share, exceeding analyst estimates, and announced a quarterly dividend of $0.40 per share, resulting in a 2.8% yield.
